# CWE-605: metrics listener binds exclusively without address reuse.
lang: go
file: CWE-605-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ServeMetrics(r *gin.Engine) error {
	ln, err := net.Listen("tcp", ":9090")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return r.RunListener(ln)
}
